name: Weird-Ohs
overview: Weird-Oh's was a short lived computer animated series that aired on Fox Family during the late 1990s. It starred a cast of deformed characters and their misadventures in Weirdsville, a place just off Route 66. Among the cast of characters were 3 main characters named Digger, Eddie and Portia. It featured a beginning sequence where the characters would be seen racing. Only 13 episodes of the series were ever produced.
